case_title: SHANNON MORENO VS. DEEMO ENTERTAINMENT CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: MARGAIN, TOMAS E. SUBSTITUTED FOR LABOR COMMISSIONER, STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS ATTORNEY FOR MORENO, SHANNON
